Video.summary: Amber confronts Shavon; Will wants to be with his cousin Tereca.
Video.title: Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?

Image.alt: Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?
Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?
Cousin, Will You Be My Girlfriend?

Video.summary: Jamie has been stripping and cheating on her boyfriend with a woman! Then, Steve believes his wife’s been cheating with another man. Next LaToya's here to cause a family feud. She's been cheating with her girlfriend's sister!
Video.title: Hidden Affairs!

Video.summary: Juice is here to reveal to Jessica that he’s a woman. Jolene has been sleeping with her sister’s girlfriend, Stephanie! Chante doesn’t approve of her sister’s fiancée and won’t hold her peace at their wedding!
Video.title: Lesbian Love Fest

Video.summary: A woman finds romance with her fiancee's twin sister; a man turns to another woman for attention; a man tells the mother of his child that he wants to be with someone else.
Video.title: Lesbian Twin Love Triangle

Video.summary: A man finds out his wife is having sex with their son-in-law; a man cheats with one of his girlfriend's best friends; a man suspects his girlfriend is cheating with his friend.
Video.title: A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid

Image.alt: A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid
A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid
A Dad, Tacos & the Kung Fu Kid

Video.summary: Nikki finally has proof of Bryan’s trysts with Melissa! Lil Ron slept with two cousins Felisha and Simone. Drew has admitted to cheating 15 times, but his latest hookup with neighbor Shaina could be his last.
Video.title: More Mistress Mayhem

Video.summary: Stripper Tiny wants to get Brandon away from his baby's mother; Brad decides to take matters into his own hands when his wife refuses to quit stripping.
Video.title: High End Stripper Smackdown

Video.summary: Shantell decided that she needs to fix her relationship with Kenneth so she's going to tell her mistress that it's over. Then Dean says that he wants to take their relationship to the next level, but Kendra's here to let Dean in on a little secret.
Video.title: Lesbian and Gay Affairs Confessed

Video.summary: Sarah confronts her boyfriend and the woman with whom he is rumored to have had a rendezvous; Thomas professes an emotional connection to his friend's girlfriend; Tootie breaks bad news to her boyfriend and his meddling sister.
Video.title: A Hot Minute

Video.summary: Kierra's friend Adrianna says Darrius is no good; Brittany wants a monogamous relationship with Mark; Samantha hopes Drew accepts her proposition to move in together.
Video.title: Harsh Heartbreakers

Video.summary: A woman sleeps with her twin sister's boyfriend; a man is caught between two women; a man asks a friend to lie for him.
Video.title: I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom

Image.alt: I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom
I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom
I Slept With Your Twin & Your Mom

Video.summary: Paris began prostituting at 11 years old and has continued for the last 10 years. She says she didn't like living by her moms rules so she left home and turned to prostitution to make money and take care of herself. Special guest host, Steve Wilkos is here to help her turn her life around.
Video.title: Steve Help Me Stop Prostituting

Video.summary: Rich and Dreama, bribed Dreama's sister, Tabby, to have sex with them before they would baby-sit her children so she could go to work at her local go go club. Then Steve is tired of supporting his daughter, Christy, and her lazy boyfriend.
Video.title: Country Lovin'!

Video.summary: Thomas' baby's mama and fiancee demand that he choose between them; Autumn reveals her true identity to a man who is interested in her; Alyse is blind-sided by her boyfriend's ruthless rejection.
Video.title: I'm Not His Cousin, I'm His Fiancee

Image.alt: I'm Not His Cousin, I'm His Fiancee
I'm Not His Cousin, I'm His Fiancee
I'm Not His Cousin, I'm His Fiancee

Video.summary: Dave says his girlfriend's constant nagging has driven him into the arms of a 72-year-old woman! Next Joe is about to tell his beautiful girlfriend that he had a one-night stand with a plus-size stripper.
Video.title: Shocking Secret Lovers

Video.summary: Tashe wants the truth about her boyfriend and another woman; Frank has a revelation that will turn his girlfriend's world upside down; Passion wonders if she should give her boyfriend a threesome.
Video.title: Turned Down for ... What?!

Video.summary: Destiny admits to cheating on her live-in boyfriend with a one-night stand; an all-out battle ensues after Kashe confesses to hooking up with her cousin's girlfriend; two men challenge each other to an eating contest to win Amber.
Video.title: Chronic Cheaters

Video.summary: Ariana's friend wants her to dump her boyfriend for him; Samantha goes on strike because she fears that her boyfriend is cheating.
Video.title: Love Sick

Video.summary: Another man may thwart Devin's pursuit of a relationship with a college student; Zhane learns who has been occupying her boyfriend's time; Emily and her brother learn that their significant others have gotten too close.
Video.title: Hot Headed Bromance

Video.summary: Fred deceived his lover, Jay, so now Jay is holding Fred gets revenge. Next Terry's obsession over his stuffed panda, Yogi, is about to drive his girlfriend out of his life! Then Benny will tell his buddy that he secretly wears women's underwear.
Video.title: Amazing Tales

Video.summary: Things were going great with his new girlfriend until Roger found himself in bed with her friend; Kandy's boyfriend reveals a secret that could change her generous ways; Dannisha's boyfriend continues to beg for a threesome.
Video.title: Down for a Threesome?

Video.summary: Today's guests say that they are on a mission of sexual exploration. They are here to venture over to the other side and fulfill their wildest sex fantasies.
Video.title: Sex Fantasies Fulfilled

Video.summary: Brandy admits to sleeping with her pregnant friend's boyfriend; Amanda fears that her fiance has eyes for another woman; Scott hopes he can sing his way back into his girlfriend's heart.
Video.title: Relationships Hit a Sour Note

Video.summary: Kevin is settling down with Ashley, but his baby mama Sandra won’t just take it! Gena lied about her pregnancy to stay married to Rico, but now Rico is the liar! He’s coming clean about cheating with Shamika!
Video.title: A Woman's Wrath

Video.summary: Jordan admits that he has not been faithful to his girlfriend; Shay confesses that she has shared a lot with her best friend; Trisha learns that her fiance slept with her friend again.
Video.title: Bitter BFFs

Video.summary: Kassi is here because she can't believe that her ex-boyfriend left her for their roommate. Then it's a sister show down when these two go head to head for the love of the same man. Plus, Bryan's girlfriend Brandy is here to tell him a secret.
Video.title: Triple Ex!

Video.summary: Tia says she has proof that her brother-in-law cheats on her sister; Maranda wants to get back together with her ex-fiance but believes it could stir up problems with her best friend; Kaila wants a threesome.
Video.title: Man Snatching Sister

Video.summary: It's Jerry's birthday and he's throwing one heck of a wild birthday bash! It's a wild birthday spectacular on today's Jerry Springer!
Video.title: Happy Birthday Mr. Springer

Video.summary: Taylor's fiance reveals the truth; Falin wants her engaged friend to know that she has been hooking up with her man; Yashisca's fiance wants to get all of his skeletons out of the closet before taking a trip down the aisle.
Video.title: Bossy Brides

Video.summary: Stripper Brittany confronts a co-worker who hooked up with one of Brittany's clients; Bebo's baby-mama confesses to sleeping with his best friend; three guests provide a surprise.
Video.title: Battle Royale With Cheese

Video.summary: Jennison is here to break up Scooter's marriage. Next Jana thinks her boyfriend is cheating, so she invited our cameras to join her when she confronted him at his home. A search of his house revealed another woman in the closet Jana's twin sister!
Video.title: Cheating Lovers Confess!

Video.summary: Josh says his world was ruined once his girlfriend gave birth to their child, so he slept with her sister; Derrick wants to dump his boyfriend so that he can be single, free and able to do his own thing.
Video.title: Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me

Image.alt: Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me
Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me
Don't Settle for My Sister ... Pick Me

Video.summary: Wayne doesn't know his fiancee, Kristin, is sleeping with her cousin! Next Springer Cam is there when JB drops the bomb on both of his girlfriends and tells them he's been cheating. Later Vinnie is sleeping with his best friend's fiancee, Shannon.
Video.title: Engagements Explode!

Video.summary: Martin won't let his son to marry his boyfriend. April wants her ex back but he wants another man!
Video.title: Mom Stole My Lady Love!
